dict.string: Poule Party may ask for camera access to scan your payment card when you pay for a game. The camera is never used otherwise.

Poule Party uses your location during an active game to place you on the map, keep the Chicken inside the shrinking game zone, and spawn nearby power-ups for you to collect. For example, when you join a game as a Hunter, your team sees the Chicken's live position within the zone so you can chase them in the real world.

Poule Party requests Always access so the Chicken's position keeps reaching the Hunters while the phone is in a pocket or backpack during an active game. For example, the Chicken can run through the neighbourhood with the screen off while the Hunters watch the zone follow them on their map. Background location stops as soon as the game ends.
